message:
feat(parser): add YAML front-matter config, unify init directive handling, and fix DOT comment stripping

Add support for YAML front-matter blocks (---/--- delimiters) in Mermaid
input, allowing config/theme/themeVariables/flowchart/sequence settings
to be specified via front-matter as an alternative to %%{init}%%
directives. Adds serde_yaml dependency for YAML parsing.

Unify init directive and front-matter config application through a shared
`apply_mermaid_config_value()` path that delegates to the new
`parse_mermaid_js_config_value()` adapter in fm-core. This replaces the
previous ad-hoc `apply_init_value()`, `json_value_to_string()`, and
`parse_direction_token()` functions, eliminating code duplication and
ensuring consistent behavior between init directives and front-matter.

Add IrBuilder methods `set_init_flowchart_curve()` and
`set_init_sequence_mirror_actors()` to support the new config fields.

Fix DOT parser comment stripping: remove the broken single-line block
comment heuristic that could never return owned strings correctly, and
instead unify /* handling with // by treating both as line-terminating
comment markers inside the quote-aware scanner.

Fix DOT `parse_subgraph_start()` to handle anonymous subgraphs (bare
"subgraph" keyword without a name) by generating synthetic cluster keys
based on line number, preventing silent parse failures.

Update `first_significant_line()` to strip front-matter before scanning
for the diagram type header, ensuring correct detection with front-matter
present.

Add tests for front-matter config parsing, init directive curve/sequence
mapping, and type detection after front-matter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,4 +11,5 @@ serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 json5 = "1.3.1"
+serde_yaml = "0.9.34"
 chumsky.workspace = true
